pi_items.source: Analyzed SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repository. The initial logbook contains 29 <dive> elements, contradicting the claim of 8. Duplicating one dive will result in a total of 30 dives, not 9.
Task description explicitly instructs to change the start time to exactly 13:35.
Task description explicitly specifies duplicating the dive at "Yellow House".

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real sample dive data from SampleDivesV2.ssrf. The task instructions claim the logbook contains 8 dives and that the "most recent dive" is at "Yellow House" in September 2011. However, the actual logbook contains 29 dives, and the most recent dive is from October 2014. The "Yellow House" dives from September 2011 are located in the middle of the logbook. An agent must successfully duplicate a dive (resulting in a total of 30 dives, contradicting the metadata claim of 9) and adjust its time to exactly 13:35.
